shots.narration: demiurge — an AI-native technical-design pipeline. Five languages, one production loop.
shots.subtitle_ko: demiurge — AI 네이티브 기술 설계 파이프라인. 5개 언어, 한 production 루프.

shots.narration: Twenty research domains, each running the same eight-verb loop.
It starts with discover. You bring an objective and a verifier. Phanes runs the OUROBOROS loop; demiurge dispatches and ingests the verified catalog. Two repositories, one canonical engine.
shots.subtitle_ko: discover로 시작 · objective + verifier · phanes가 OUROBOROS 루프 · demiurge가 dispatch + 흡수 · 2 저장소 1 엔진

shots.narration: Spec. Gemini drafts a measurable goal, based on the hot-spot you typed. Never auto-applied. Always reviewed by a human, then committed to the canonical SSOT.
shots.subtitle_ko: spec · Gemini가 hint 기반 @goal 초안 · 자동 적용 안 함 · 검수 후 SSOT 커밋

shots.narration: Structure. A deterministic dependency tree. No model in this loop.
shots.subtitle_ko: structure · 결정론적 의존 트리 · 이 루프에 LLM 없음

shots.narration: Design. Three honest trade-offs. It never picks a winner. The human decides.
shots.subtitle_ko: design · 3-옵션 trade-off · 우열 선언 안 함 · 사람이 결정

shots.narration: Analyze. Server-sent events stream the loop. You watch the system think.
shots.subtitle_ko: analyze · SSE로 라이브 tail · AI 사고 과정 실시간

shots.narration: Verify is sacred. The hexa calculator returns one of five tiers — closed-form, numerical, citation, insufficient, falsified. Zero LLM verdicts. Every claim carries its provenance. This is what separates production AI from chat.
shots.subtitle_ko: verify는 신성 영역 · 5-tier (closed-form · numerical · citation · insufficient · falsified) · LLM 판정 0회 · provenance 부착 · production AI와 챗봇의 차이

shots.narration: Synth routes the heavy work. Pool, Vertex AI, Cloud Run. Deterministic dispatch.
shots.subtitle_ko: synth · 라우팅: pool · Vertex AI · Cloud Run · 결정론적

shots.narration: Handoff. Korean and English, side by side, with the first action highlighted. The next person — researcher, engineer, or regulator — gets exactly the context they need.
shots.subtitle_ko: handoff · 한/영 사이드바이사이드 · 첫 액션 강조 · 연구자/엔지니어/규제기관 누구든 필요한 맥락 100%

shots.narration: Solo, Team, Org. Five locales. Stripe-backed. Fourteen-day trial.

Seven Google Cloud products work together — Vertex AI, Cloud Run, Cloud Build, Artifact Registry, Firestore, Identity Toolkit, and Secret Manager. Authentication runs through the metadata server. Zero secrets ever live in our code.
shots.subtitle_ko: GCP 7 제품 — Vertex AI · Cloud Run · Cloud Build · Artifact Registry · Firestore · Identity Toolkit · Secret Manager · metadata-server ADC · 코드 시크릿 0

shots.narration: New GCP project, after the submission start date. Rule met.
shots.subtitle_ko: 신규 GCP 프로젝트 · 제출 시작일 이후 생성 · 규정 충족

shots.narration: And here it is. A live call to Gemini 2.5 Flash, from production, right now. Two hundred prompt tokens in, twenty-three candidate tokens out.
shots.subtitle_ko: 라이브 Gemini 2.5 Flash · production · 지금 · prompt 200 · candidate 23

shots.narration: demiurge dot dancinlab dot org. Built with Gemini.
